SPAWN 12 15
NPC 8 8 Welcome to the inn! Rest your weary bones here.
NPC 15 10 I heard strange noises coming from the temple last night.
NPC 10 12 The ale here is the finest in all of Madrian.
DOOR 12 16 __exit__ door_inn_exit
